subject: nervous

body:
This could change the race. | Friend --

I'm not trying to be dramatic about this (I swear! I'm really not!), but there's a situation developing in Iowa and New Hampshire that could change the course of this election.

Last month, we told you about how much money Bernie Sanders' campaign was raising. Now, the other shoe has dropped: I just found out that he's outspending us on TV advertising in Iowa and New Hampshire.

Adding more TV ads just isn't in our budget. We're locked into spending critical funds on organizing and field offices, and if we cut into that budget, we'll lose what this campaign is all about. I'm not going to do that. **The only way to fix this is with your help. Chip in $1 today, and help close the gap in Iowa and New Hampshire:** | [ | [**Donate $1**](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=8&ms=MjQ0MDU2NTIS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzIwNjczOTU1S0&mt=1&rt=0)

Thanks,

Robby

name: Rand Paul
subject: Wish Rand a Happy Birthday!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rand Paul for President
body:
Dear Patriot,

Today, Rand Paul is celebrating his 53rd
birthday.

I know in the midst of a busy travel week
during this last final stretch before the Iowa caucuses, it would
mean the world to him if his supporters would wish him a happy
birthday.

Can I count on to make a generous
contribution of $53 -- or even $25 or $10 -- to help reach our
$53,000 fundraising goal for today?

The truth is, Rand has been hitting the
campaign trail hard this week.

In New Hampshire, he spoke to capacity
crowds. In Iowa, I know we'll see the same.

With the intensity of Rand's supporters and
our growing crowds, I don't believe the media's blackout can
truly last.

Rand is doing everything he can to ensure his
crystal clear message of liberty goes straight to the voters.

We will succeed. We are poised to shock
people.

But only with you help.

Patriot, will you please help me wish Rand a
happy birthday with your most generous contribution of $53 -- or
even $25 or $10 -- right away!

In liberty,
Doug Stafford
Chief Political Strategist

Rand turns 53 today and I'm trying to get a

name: Patrick Murphy
subject: Call with the White House and Sen. Warren
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Patrick Murphy | 4521 PGA Blvd #412, Palm Beach Gardens, FL 33418 | [http://murphyforflorida
body:
| Friends,

**Late yesterday, I spoke with the White House and Elizabeth Warren.** We discussed President Obama's plan to address this nation's tragic gun violence epidemic.

His speech announcing the Executive Action this week had a profound effect on me. It brought me back to a moment I'll never forget.

Back when I was attending an orientation meeting for new representatives, I noticed phones buzzing in unison. Quickly, everyone in the room became distraught. That's because it was December 14, 2012. It was the day of the harrowing mass shooting at Sandy Hook Elementary that claimed the innocent lives of 20 small children and six adults.

We all thought this unspeakable tragedy would prompt Washington to come together and do something to end the bloodshed. We thought, surely it was the time for action. **But time passed, political gridlock settled in, and nothing was accomplished -- until yesterday. Now it 's time to follow through.**

[**The President 's actions are a step in the right direction and we need to stand with him and demand that Congress step up to the plate. Join me, President Obama, and Elizabeth Warren in support of common-sense gun reforms.**](http://fl.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae224e/738133e4/3b5fdc00/7f83977d/2783980986/VEsH/ "http://fl.murphyforflorida.com/e160106pm")

In the past few years alone, we've seen precious first-graders robbed of growing into adulthood, college students murdered on their own campuses, and people fatally shot in movie theaters, grocery stores, and places of worship. In Florida, from the Keys to Pensacola and here in my own district, we have mourned countless lives taken too soon by bullets.

President Obama's plan to strengthen mental health care, require background checks for online gun sales, and increase the FBI's capacity to run background checks is a start.

_The next step is up to Congress._ It's unacceptable that suspected terrorists can walk into a store and buy a lethal weapon, and it's unacceptable that anyone can purchase a gun without a background check at a gun show. We need to put partisan politics aside and pass a measure to close the terrorist gun loophole and close the gun show loophole now.

[**Friends, I need you to sign this petition to show you support the President 's actions to curb gun violence, and are demanding that Congress follow suit. Can I count on you to join me and Senator Warren?**](http://fl.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae224e/738133e4/3b5fdc00/7f83977d/2783980986/VEsE/ "http://fl.murphyforflorida.com/e160106pm")

Thank you,

Patrick

| | | | | Paid for by Friends of Patrick Murphy | 4521 PGA Blvd #412, Palm Beach Gardens, FL 33418 | [http://murphyforflorida.com](http://fl.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae224e/738133e4/3b5fdc00/7f83977e/2783980986/VEsF/ "http://murphyforflorida.com/")

It's unacceptable that suspected terrorists can walk into a store and buy a lethal weapon, and it's unacceptable that anyone can purchase a gun without a background check at a gun show. We need to put partisan politics aside and pass a measure to close the terrorist gun loophole and close the gun show loophole now. "" Thank you, Patrick | | | | | Paid for by Friends of Patrick Murphy | 4521 PGA Blvd #412, Palm Beach Gardens, FL 33418 | ""

name: Jeff Weaver, Bernie 2016
subject: Donald Trump is in Vermont today
body:
#
Friend,
Later today, Donald Trump will hold one of his campaign events in Burlington, Vermont -- the city where Bernie was mayor, and the city from which we are running our campaign for president.
Donald Trump has been attacking Bernie for weeks now, and we expect more of the same tonight. There's a reason he's coming to Burlington. Trump wants people to think that in our hometown, he has more support than us.
Well, you and I know that's not true. **But there's a good way we can stick it to Trump: by showing that a billionaire is no match for our political revolution.**
[**Donate $3 to show the strength of our movement while Donald Trump is in Bernie's backyard.**](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb2b51/43f17890/47067dda/620fb9a4/1508948542/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/our--political--revolution?refcode=em160107v1full")
**[Donate $3](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb2b51/43f17890/47067dda/620fb9a4/1508948542/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/our--political--revolution?refcode=em160107v1full")**
I don't know if you've seen one of these Donald Trump events, but they can get pretty ugly.
So here's what I want to do. Let me know if you're with me.
When Donald Trump tries to tell Vermont that climate change isn't real, show that you stand with Bernie's plan to act swiftly to save our planet.
When Donald Trump says that he wants to deport immigrants, or ban Muslims from entering the country, or build a wall at our southern border, show that you stand with Bernie's plan for a humane immigration policy that unites families.
When Donald Trump tells Burlington that billionaires like him know what's best for the economy, show that you stand with Bernie to make an economy that works for all Americans, not just the wealthy.
And when Donald Trump tries to say that he can be elected president, show that you stand with Bernie Sanders, the Democratic candidate who is best able to defeat Trump in the general election.
[**Contribute $3 to Bernie's campaign to send a message to Donald Trump that our political revolution will best blustering billionaires any day of the week.**](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb2b51/43f17890/47067dda/620fb9a4/1508948542/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/our--political--revolution?refcode=em160107v1full")
Our campaign is the best firewall preventing Donald Trump and his dangerous rhetoric from ever getting into the White House. And today, we can make him pay for it.
This'll be _yuge._
In solidarity,
Jeff Weaver
Campaign Manager
Bernie 2016

**[Contribute](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb2b51/43f17890/47067dda/620fb9a4/1508948542/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/our--political--revolution?refcode=em160107v1full")**

__ __

| **" Obama administration taps Patrick Murphy, Elizabeth Warren to praise new gun rules"** Friends,

The White House called on Patrick and Senator Elizabeth Warren to help gain support for President Obama's executive actions to curb gun violence.

As a strong advocate for common-sense gun reforms, Patrick was moved by the President's speech on Tuesday. He believes President Obama's plan to close online background check loopholes and better enforce the rules that keep guns out of the wrong hands is a step in the right direction. _It 's a start._

**Now it 's up to Congress to take the next step.** We still need the GOP-controlled Congress to prohibit suspected terrorists from buying firearms and require background checks for all gun show purchases. **These actions can stop lives from being cut short by gun violence.**

Patrick is fighting to make sure Congress puts partisan politics aside and takes swift action. He needs your support. We will not give up Friends, and we hope you won't either.

Friends,

This week, President Obama's executive order took a huge first step in the fight against gun violence.

_But it 's just the beginning._

There's still so much more work to do to close the "gun show loophole," make background checks mandatory for all gun sales, and keep deadly weapons out of the hands of dangerous people.

**_Thankfully, Elizabeth Warren is fighting back!_** Yesterday, Sen. Warren issued an inspiring call-to-action demanding Congress crack down on gun violence:
[](http://go.boldpac.com/page/m/b7ea722/e60883a/719c1a19/14424ab6/661653625/VEsHAQ/ "http://go.boldpac.com/page/s/stand-with-elizabeth-warren?source=MS_EM_PET_2016.01.07_B2_Warren-NRA_X__F1_S2_C1__ns")

**[Sign your name to stand with Elizabeth Warren in the fight against gun violence>>](http://go.boldpac.com/page/m/b7ea722/e60883a/719c1a19/14424ab6/661653625/VEsHAA/ "http://go.boldpac.com/page/s/stand-with-elizabeth-warren?source=MS_EM_PET_2016.01.07_B2_Warren-NRA_X__F1_S2_C1__ns")**
Friends, [tomorrow](http://go.boldpac.com/page/m/b7ea722/e60883a/719c1a19/14424ab6/661653625/VEsHAw/ "http://go.boldpac.com/page/s/stand-with-elizabeth-warren?source=MS_EM_PET_2016.01.07_B2_Warren-NRA_X__F1_S2_C1__ns") marks exactly five years since Representative Gabby Giffords and 18 others were shot in Tucson, Arizona.

And since then, we've seen Congress sit idly by as tragedies in Newtown, Aurora, and San Bernardino shocked the nation.

Right now is a truly historic moment in the fight against gun violence. Elizabeth Warren is fired up and ready to take the fight to the NRA -- we can't afford to miss this chance.

**[Sign your name to let Senator Warren know you stand with her:](http://go.boldpac.com/page/m/b7ea722/e60883a/719c1a19/14424ab6/661653625/VEsHAg/ "http://go.boldpac.com/page/s/stand-with-elizabeth-warren?source=MS_EM_PET_2016.01.07_B2_Warren-NRA_X__F1_S2_C1__ns")**

[http://go.boldpac.com/Stand-With-Elizabeth](http://go.boldpac.com/page/m/b7ea722/e60883a/719c1a19/14424ab6/661653625/VEsHDQ/ "http://go.boldpac.com/page/s/stand-with-elizabeth-warren?source=MS_EM_PET_2016.01.07_B2_Warren-NRA_X__F1_S2_C1__ns")
